required_preferences.fact: Arranges and coordinates her brother’s academic support and logistics remotely — no longer tutors him directly, but manages his travel, housing, and financial aid for his out-of-state STEM program

required_preferences.fact: Avoids chocolate, caffeine, processed meats, citrus fruits, and dairy — never consumes these foods due to heightened migraine and medication-trigger risk
